prescriptions.clinical_notes: Subjective chest tightness with radiation to left arm. Heart sounds normal. Clear lungs. EKG showing borderline Q waves.
prescriptions.admission_notes: Admit to ward bed for overnight observation, telemetry monitor, and serial cardiac enzymes.
prescriptions.referral_notes: Referred for neurology/cardiac syncope diagnostic assessment.
